regulations.title: Pressure vessel inspection intervals
regulations.requirement: Pressure vessels in high-pressure service shall be inspected by a competent authority at intervals not exceeding two years.
regulations.check_query: What is the inspection interval for pressure vessels and who performs the inspection?

regulations.title: Rotating equipment maintenance records
regulations.requirement: Maintenance records for rotating equipment including pumps, compressors and turbines shall be maintained and reviewed at intervals not exceeding one year.
regulations.check_query: Are maintenance records maintained for rotating equipment such as pumps and compressors?

regulations.title: Fencing of dangerous machinery
regulations.requirement: Every dangerous part of any machinery must be securely fenced by safeguards of substantial construction.
regulations.check_query: Are procedures for machinery guarding and fencing of dangerous parts documented?

regulations.title: Examination of pressure plant
regulations.requirement: If any plant or machinery or any part thereof is operated at a pressure above atmospheric pressure, effective measures shall be taken to ensure that the safe working pressure is not exceeded.
regulations.check_query: Are safe working pressure limits documented and enforced for pressure plant?

regulations.title: Hydraulic testing of compressed gas cylinders
regulations.requirement: Compressed gas cylinders must be subjected to hydraulic pressure test at intervals not exceeding five years.
regulations.check_query: Is there a procedure for periodic hydraulic testing of gas cylinders?

regulations.title: Fire fighting equipment maintenance
regulations.requirement: Fire fighting equipment shall be inspected and maintained in accordance with the manufacturer recommendations and at intervals not exceeding one year.
regulations.check_query: Are fire fighting equipment inspection and maintenance procedures documented?

regulations.title: Emergency response procedures
regulations.requirement: A documented emergency response procedure shall be available and all personnel shall be trained on emergency response at intervals not exceeding six months.
regulations.check_query: Is there a documented emergency response procedure and is training conducted regularly?

regulations.title: HAZOP study documentation
regulations.requirement: A Hazard and Operability Study (HAZOP) shall be conducted for all new process units and reviewed every five years for existing units.
regulations.check_query: Has a HAZOP study been conducted and are the findings documented?

regulations.title: Occupational health and safety risk assessment
regulations.requirement: The organization shall establish, implement and maintain processes to identify hazards and assess OH&S risks.
regulations.check_query: Is there a documented process for occupational health and safety risk assessment?

regulations.title: Work permit system
regulations.requirement: A written work permit system shall be implemented for all hot work, confined space entry, electrical isolation and height work activities.
regulations.check_query: Is there a documented work permit system for hazardous activities such as hot work and confined space entry?
